text: The North Library has six quiet study rooms. Students must book a North Library study room online before using it.
The South Library has group study rooms for walk-in use. South Library rooms cannot be booked online.
The blue campus shuttle goes to Riverside Station and leaves from platform 3 every weekday at 08:15.
The green campus shuttle goes to Northside Hall and leaves from platform 5 every weekday at 08:20.
The Advanced NLP course has a written final exam. The final exam counts for 100 percent of the course grade.
The Advanced NLP course project presentation is optional practice. It does not replace the written final exam.
The robotics lab requires safety training before students may use the soldering station.
The robotics lab visitor tour does not allow visitors to use the soldering station.
Luna at the Riverside shelter must eat rabbit-based food because her record lists a chicken allergy. Riverside Luna wears a yellow collar.
Luna at the Northside shelter eats standard chicken-based food and wears a green collar.
Juniper was scheduled for the 2026-05-02 adoption event, but a 2026-05-01 veterinary note says Juniper must rest for seven days and cannot attend adoption events during that period.
Jupiter is Juniper's sister. Jupiter may attend the 2026-05-02 adoption event and has no activity restriction.
The Data Science consultation office is in Building C, room 2.14. Consultations are available on Mondays.
The Digital Humanities consultation office is in Building C, room 3.05. Consultations are available on Fridays.
The metal workshop requires an induction certificate before students can operate the laser cutter.
The chemistry wet lab requires a lab coat and safety glasses before students can handle liquid samples.
The Python homework clinic meets on Thursday from 16:00 to 18:00 in Room A12.
The statistics homework clinic meets on Wednesday from 14:00 to 16:00 in Room A12.
The ORKG seminar meets in Room B20 on Tuesday mornings and focuses on semantic scholarly knowledge graphs.
The ontology reading group meets in Room B21 on Tuesday afternoons and focuses on ontology engineering papers.
The bike repair station is beside the east entrance. It has tire pumps and basic tools but no spare inner tubes.
The laptop loan desk is beside the west entrance. Students may borrow a laptop for up to two days.
The German conversation course is for A2 speakers and meets on Monday evenings.
The Estonian language course is for complete beginners and meets on Wednesday evenings.
